revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q25349100)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q25349100)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{wikidata link|Q25349100}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Literary Chinese-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{wikidata link|Q25349100}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Literary Chinese-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{wikidata link|Q25349100}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Literary Chinese-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{wikidata link|Q25349100}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:Articles containing Literary Chinese-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles containing Chinese-language text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25501823396|time triggered pipeline]]
